title: Onboarding - Login
scenario: First-time app launch shows license agreement, login options (Microsoft/Apple/Google/username-password), and navigates to Home Screen on successful login
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. On the License Agreement screen, tap "Accept" to proceed.
3. On the Login screen, observe the available options: Log in or Sign up via Microsoft, Apple, Google, or use Username/Password.
4. (Optional) Tap "Skip" to bypass login and proceed to the Home Screen.
5. Select a login method (e.g., Microsoft, Apple, Google, or Username/Password) and complete the authentication flow.
6. After successful authentication, verify the app navigates to the Home Screen.
expected: User completes onboarding, accepts license agreement, and after successful login (or skip) is taken to the Home Screen.
